content:
# Recommendations вЂ” after iter-017

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize next
1. **G2 `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1509) вЂ” the ONE residual cokernel-leaf sorry.** Closing it makes G3 (`cokernel_skyscraper_hom_isIso`), the def, and the whole `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` assembly fully axiom-clean (everything else above is already body-sorry-free, gated only on this). The `PreservesCokernel.iso` reduction is already proven and compiling; only `cokernel (G.map f) в‰… kМ„` remains. **Recommend an effort-breaker split BEFORE proving**, into two stub lemmas:
   - (a) **naturality**: `G.map f = Submodule.inclusion (orderAtPSubmodule D P в‰¤ orderAtPSubmodule (single P 1+D) P)` under the `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` isos (trace `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup`);
   - (b) **DVR residue**: `(ПЂ^{-(n+1)}рќ’Є_{C,P})/(ПЂ^{-n}рќ’Є_{C,P}) в‰… рќ’Є/рќ”Є в‰… kМ„` via the ПЂ^{n+1}В· kМ„-linear automorphism of K(C) + `residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one` + `stalk_isDVR_of_smooth`.
   This is the ~200вЂ“400 LOC residue lane the planner already flagged; blueprint G2 prose is ADEQUATE (full recipe present, lvb-ocofd confirmed). Reuse S1 lemmas (`isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_smooth`, `residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one`).

## Coverage debt (planner: author blueprint entries вЂ” review does not write prose)
- **`AlgebraicJacobian.Scheme.WeilDivisor.sheafOf.stalkFunctor_map_carrierPresheaf_le_hom_epi_of_ne`** (OcOfD.lean L1417) вЂ” NEW this iter, axiom-clean, NO blueprint entry (sole OcOfD `dag-query unmatched` node). It is the real driver of the away-from-P half of G3. Lean depends on: `carrierSubmoduleSheaf_add_single_eq_of_not_mem`, `stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply`, `germ_res_apply`, `germ_exist`, `ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective`. Add a `lemma` block (suggest near `lem:carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem`) and repoint the `_isIso` proof `\uses` from `carrierPresheaf_le_hom_app_isIso_of_not_mem` to it (the `% NOTE:` I added records this).

## Deferred / do-not-reassign-blind
- **Bridge `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` (L1722) + 2 `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners (L1863/1869)** вЂ” last deep S3 piece (Hartshorne II.6.3A algebraic Hartogs). Already decomposed in blueprint (iter-017): `\mathlibok` anchor `mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one` в†’ `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` (chartв‡’Dedekind + valuation=order + gluing) в†’ iso assembly. Scaffold the sub-lemma stubs FIRST, then `prove`. Do NOT re-attempt the whole bridge blind. Same file as G2 вЂ” cannot run concurrently with the G2 lane.
- **Off-cone `sheafOf_singlePoint_iso` (L771)** вЂ” out-of-cone substrate; not a blueprint-owed prover target.

## Documentation-rot вЂ” comment-only cleanup for the NEXT OcOfD prover (review cannot edit `.lean`)
Pair these with the G2 or bridge code lane (no separate lane needed):
- `sheafOf` docstring L606вЂ“633 + inline comment L660: claim a residual sorry; `sheafOf` body is sorry-free (since iter-014).
- S3 header L1025: still labels `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` "STUBBED" (closed axiom-clean iter-016).
- `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` docstring L1625вЂ“1693: still "Deep gap" with G1/G2/G3 all open; G1 (epi route) + G3 closed iter-017, only G2 residue open.

## Reusable proof patterns (also in PROJECT_STATUS KB)
- **Adjunction-transpose = residue-evaluation morphism**: build `coker f вџ¶ skyscraper P kМ„` as `(stalkSkyscraperSheafAdjunction P.point).homEquiv _ _ G2.hom`; no explicit stalkwise construction.
- **`IsIso.of_isIso_fac_right (f := вЂ¦)`** with `f` named explicitly for triangle 2-out-of-3; `inv (вЂ¦)` in a *statement type* triggers a failing IsIso synth вЂ” avoid.
- **Left-adjoint cokernel preservation thread**: `haveI hLadj := adj.isLeftAdjoint; haveI hpzm := preservesZeroMorphisms_of_isLeftAdjoint _; haveI hpcs : PreservesColimitsOfShape WalkingParallelPair G := inferInstance; haveI hpc2 := hpcs.preservesColimit;` THEN `PreservesCokernel.iso G f`. `cokernelComparison`/`instIsIsoCokernelComparison` FAIL inside the term on the sheaf category.

## Subagent notes (no CRITICAL/HIGH)
- lean-auditor/iter017: 0/4/5 вЂ” all majors are stale docstrings (above). No laundering.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd: 0 must-fix вЂ” coverage debt (above) + the `% NOTE:`-annotated `\uses` divergence.
